results.title: Darden Restaurants AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Darden Restaurants operates over 2,100 restaurants across 10 brands including Olive Garden, LongHorn Steakhouse, and recently acquired Chuy's[1]. The company has begun deploying AI-powered technologies across its operations, including chatbots for customer service, predictive analytics for inventory management, and personalized marketing campaigns[2]. Darden is also rolling out a new point-of-sale system across nine brands to drive speedier service and improve data capabilities[3]. While Darden's AI initiatives are in early stages compared to QSR leaders like Yum Brands, the company is strategically implementing technology to enhance operational efficiency and guest experiences[4].
...

Darden shows minimal AI hiring emphasis with only 3.8% of job postings mentioning AI. AI requirements are limited to engineering roles at 14.3%, while no non-tech positions mention AI skills, suggesting early-stage AI adoption focused primarily on technical infrastructure rather than org-wide AI integration.

## Frequently Asked Questions
...
What AI technologies is Darden Restaurants currently using?
...
Darden is using AI chatbots for customer service, predictive analytics for inventory management, machine learning for guest forecasting, and AI-driven personalized marketing campaigns.
...
Darden's AI approach focuses on
...
human capabilities rather than replacing them, emphasizing operational efficiency and guest experience improvements rather
...
drive-thru automation
...
Is Darden planning to expand its AI initiatives?
...
Yes, Darden continues to evaluate opportunities to incorporate AI-based technology across its operations, including the ongoing rollout of new POS systems and potential expansion of current AI applications.

results.title: Matthew King
highlights:
Sr. IT Support Analyst at [Darden](https://www.linkedin.com/company/darden)
...
### [Darden](https://www.linkedin.com/company/darden)
...
#### Sr. IT Support Analyst (Current)
...
Performing root cause analysis of IT issues that arise in restaurant environments in the front of house, back of house, and manager office. Performing scheduled upgrades to OS images, hardware, and firmware updates. Assist various teams for exposure outside my specialty including the vulnerability team who monitors Windows patching and SCCM failures, the New Restaurant Opening team with new equipment being piloted, the Hardware Rollout Team who performs the physical work of installing new equipment with any issues that arise, and the Restaurant Systems team with problems on the kitchen display systems and the accompanying software for them. Working to maintain and upgrade the Quality Assurance, Culinary Systems, and Service Desk lab systems to ensure testing and training purposes are able to be performed. Assisting with the Service Desk training of new agents to help drive first call resolutions and appropriate escalations to the Support Analyst team. Working alongside the Systems Engineering team to perform proactive maintenance and upgrades to Windows and Linux systems utilizing PowerShell and SCCM automation tools, C# programming, Hyper-V virtualization, SCOM monitoring, SSH via Putty and PowerShell, along with various other programs. Assist with the first pilots of a new Point of Sale software developed in house to create documentation of common issues and troubleshooting for these issues to distribute to applicable teams.
...
Developed PowerShell automation to streamline system management. Built and maintained C# applications supporting IT operations. Created SCCM deployments and resolved configuration issues. Supported QA environments including virtualized systems. Produced technical documentation and training automation. Managed RestDB releases and version control with Git and Azure DevOps.

results.title: Data Scientist (GenAI and Machine Learning) | Curate Partners | Consulting & Talent Solutions
highlights:
Data Scientist (GenAI and Machine Learning) | Curate Partners | Consulting & Talent Solutions
...
# Data Scientist (GenAI and Machine Learning)
...
- Get In Touch
- Job Category: Data AI & ML Jobs
- Job Type: Remote
...
Job Category: Data AI & ML Jobs
...
### Responsibilities
...
- Develop and apply machine learning models, including techniques such as decision trees and forecasting, to solve business problems
- Use generative artificial intelligence methods to extract insights from complex document sets, including structured and unstructured text
- Perform data analysis, feature engineering, and model development using Python
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to interpret data, communicate findings, and support decision-making
- Translate domain-specific language and requirements into actionable data science solutions
- Continuously refine models and analytical approaches to improve accuracy and performance
...
### Required experience and skills
...
- Strong background in data science, with hands-on experience in machine learning model development
- Proficiency in Python, including libraries such as Pandas for data manipulation and analysis
- Working knowledge of SQL for querying and managing data
- Experience with generative artificial intelligence, including prompt-based techniques
- Solid understanding of statistical methods and analytical techniques
- Experience with machine learning approaches such as tree-based models and forecasting methods
- Ability to communicate complex analytical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
...

protocols, and Model Context Protocol (MCP)

Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines for ML systems

monitoring, logging, and observability tools for production

Contributions to open-source AI/ML projects

results.title: Principal Software Architect, Data, AI, ML | frontendnode-production.up.railway.app
highlights:
# Principal Software Architect, Data, AI, ML
...
Job Description: • Define and enable data architecture and engineering standards across Product Lines, ensuring consistent patterns for modeling, storage, access, governance, and responsible AI/ML usage. • Lead data-focused architecture reviews and technical governance for new products, platform initiatives, and AI/ML solutions, with particular emphasis on scalable, secure use of Snowflake and related cloud data services. • Own the reference architectures for enterprise data platforms, including Snowflake-based warehouses/lakehouses, streaming/real-time data, semantic models, and analytics/BI consumption patterns used across product teams. • Partner with Product, Engineering, Infrastructure, and Security to design data platforms that support analytics, reporting, operational workloads, and AI/ML use cases, ensuring clear data contracts and safe pathways for AI feature development. • Drive modernization of legacy schemas, ETL/ELT pipelines, and reporting stacks into scalable, cloud-native data and AI platforms with clear service and data domain boundaries, leveraging Snowflake and modern orchestration tooling where appropriate. • Define and promote patterns for data contracts, event-driven architecture, and CDC/streaming feeds that enable reliable, low-latency data sharing across systems and make high-quality data continuously available for AI/ML workloads. • Establish standards and best practices for data quality, lineage, observability, cataloging, and governance (including privacy, security, and compliance requirements) so AI/ML features are built on trustworthy, well-understood datasets. • Partner with AI and engineering teams to design data and feature platforms that power modern AI workloads (e.g., feature stores, vector search, retrieval-augmented generation, and model-serving integrations), including how these are realized on Snowflake and adjacent services. • Anticipate long-term risks in data growth, performance, reliability, and cost (including Snowflake usage and storage/compute patterns), and design solutions that prevent systemic issues across products and environments. • Mentor architects, principal engineers, and data engineers across teams, raising organizational maturity in data and AI architecture and accelerating adoption of shared patterns for Snowflake, data contracts, and AI/ML enablement. • Operate as a trusted technical advisor to executives and senior leaders, translating data and AI architecture decisions into clear business value, risk tradeoffs, and roadmap implications. • Represent the company in data and AI technical communities, helping position Restaurant365 as a leading data-driven and AI-enabled SaaS platform.

results.title: Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development | Wfhforgeon
highlights:
Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development | Wfhforgeon
...
# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
Mathematics, or a
...
is strongly preferred and will be given special consideration.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.
